global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a mix of text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save with confidence and try the service for free.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a modern font against a purple background.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A large purple area with overlapping geometric shapes, including circles and rectangles, creating a visually appealing abstract design.

elements.label: Confidence message
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Save with confidence' positioned centrally, conveying a reassuring message.

elements.label: Peace of mind
elements.description: A secondary line of text below the main message, reading 'Built for peace of mind' in a smaller font, maintaining the same color scheme.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small button at the bottom center with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Try for free' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: The entire background of the ad is a solid purple color, providing a vibrant and cohesive backdrop for the elements.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Free trial button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', designed to attract attention with its contrasting color.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: The logo appears again at the top left, reinforcing brand identity with its distinct font and color.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
